title: Subitem Dependency Automation
excerpt:
I set up a bunch of subitem dependencies, but there doesn’t seem to be automation available for these.  “When subitem status changes to something, change  the status of its dependent subitem status to something.”

posts.author: MelissaPFA (Melissa Reyes)
posts.cookedHtml:
I set up a bunch of subitem dependencies, but there doesn’t seem to be automation available for these. “When subitem status changes to something, change the status of its dependent subitem status to something.”

This functionality would be incredibly helpful.

Thank you!

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml: Bummer, I just discovered this, gonna make a big change to our process for tracking tasks. Trying to use subitems has lots of frustrations.

posts.author: MelissaPFA (Melissa Reyes)
posts.cookedHtml: It sure does. I set up all my subitem dependencies and they just sit there waiting to maybe some day be useful.
